versions.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install tetrate-base oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=tetrate-base:1.28.20000" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install tetrate-istiod oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=tetrate-istiod:1.28.20000" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install tetrate-gateway oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=tetrate-gateway:1.28.20000" \
  -n kcm-system
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   tetrate-base-1-28-20000         true
# kcm-system   tetrate-istiod-1-28-20000       true
# kcm-system   tetrate-gateway-1-28-20000      true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: tetrate-istio
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: tetrate-base-1-28-20000
      name: tetrate-base
      namespace: istio-system
    - template: tetrate-istiod-1-28-20000
      name: tetrate-istiod
      namespace: istio-system
      dependsOn:
      - name: tetrate-base
        namespace: istio-system
    - template: tetrate-gateway-1-28-20000
      name: tetrate-gateway
      namespace: istio-system
      dependsOn:
      - name: tetrate-istiod
        namespace: istio-system
